assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for BFCM period and explicitly states it blocks everything including critical security patches with 30-day max duration

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for June code freeze and states it blocks ALL upgrades during the freeze

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion for ongoing minor upgrade control — allows CP patches but blocks disruptive changes
assertions.reason: Correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades for permanent control and explicitly states it allows control plane security patches while blocking disruptive upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 30-day maximum duration for no_upgrades exclusions and shows the permanent exclusion extending up to EoS date (2025-06-01)

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Provides complete gcloud commands with correct --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for all three exclusion types (no_upgrades twice, no_minor_or_node_upgrades once)

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions limit or the 48h maintenance requirement in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'You can still manually upgrade whenever YOU choose, even with exclusions active. The exclusions only block auto-upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, though it mentions EoS override scenarios
